column1: 32,Performance,Delay JavaScript execution as much as possible,Qwik boots interactive with ~1KB JS and loads more only on interaction.,Let Qwik lazy-load code on demand instead of eager upfront execution.,Eagerly download and run JS that blocks interactivity.,// component$ + $ boundaries let Qwik defer chunks automatically,// import everything eagerly at module top for immediate execution,High,https://qwik.dev/docs/concepts/think-qwik/
